text: I wake up at 6:30 every morning, even on weekends. First, I drink a glass of water and do ten minutes of stretching. After a quick shower, I have breakfast—usually oatmeal with fruit. My work starts at 9 a.m., and I spend most of the day answering emails and attending meetings. At lunchtime, I take a 30-minute walk to clear my mind. In the evening, I exercise for 45 minutes, either running or doing yoga. Dinner is around 7 p.m., followed by reading or watching a show. This routine keeps me balanced and productive. Consistency is the key—it makes everything feel automatic.
